However, their success won't last too long without hard work. There are countless examples of people who werelucky enough to be born with a great talant but later couldn't achieve anything because of being too lazy and self-assured . Luck can help you once and let you down later. That's why you should never rely on it. Hard work is fundamental . As they say, hard work alwaysbeats talant. I totally agree with the saying. No luck is helpful if you are a lazy person. On my point of view, all successful people are hardworking. On the other hand, luck and talant can help you start and solve some difficulties. Taking risks can sometimes bring you up and you can use some luck on your path to success. All in all, I think you should put all the effort into the work. If you do it, luck will eventually come. And the combination of hard work and luck is the true key to becoming successful."
